name: The Girly Gauntlet
description:
This is a text adventure largely inspired by Trap Quest by Aika.

The name is from another game on TFgames.site which hasn't been updated for many years now.

You should start with a male character, they will not remain masculine through the adventure. This is about erotic transformations and erotic encounters. Be prepared for unexpected situations. The staring shape of your male character is pre-defined by the prompt, however you can ask the system to change it by editing the response sections of it and by telling it with a [System Request: ] describing the nature of the change

🚩Content warnings: forced feminization, gender modification, dubcon, non-con, possible degradation, humiliation, and dehumanization. This can get DARK.

Each message should have a status on the end of it, giving a state of your body. These are supposed to change over the course of the roleplay. If you have don't get one just reply with a message holding the following string. [System Request: do not answer as {{char}} instead simply return the current status section]

Updates:

Dec-18-2024 changed status section to specify jewel count

Dec-21-2024 added mention of a door in the starting bedroom leading out. Changed the title section to a name section.

Dec-25-2024 modified the scenario slightly to allow for broader range of content
creator: Mysteras
